title: Inbound Management/Gains
summary: MCAAT Admin checklist - Inbound Management/Gains. 18 unique items across 3 audiences.
applicabilityLevel: IPAC, Reporting Unit, and Supporting Unit

source.title: MCAAT Admin Checklist - Inbound Management/Gains
source.publisher: Marine Corps Manpower and Reserve Affairs

items.question: For Marines arriving to their first Permanent Duty Station (PDS), is a comprehensive review of Pay and Allowance received through the training pipeline completed within 60 days of join?
Are active duty reporting units validating pay and entitlements for activated reservist attached to their administrative reporting unit code (ARUC)?
For joins processed outside of IBI, is the join audit process completed IAW MCTFSPRIUM, 12-120103?
For joins processed outside of IBI, does the organization maintain and retain supporting documents on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?
For joins processed outside of IBI, is the PCS travel claim submitted in accordance with current regulations?

For joins processed outside of IBI or at DUINS station, is the unit ensuring all required documents are resident in the OMPF? (Contractual documents (i.e. DD Form 4, DD Form 1966), dependent documents (as applicable i.e. NAVMC 10922, Marriage Certificate), and as applicable, Meritorious Promotion Warrants (DD Form 216), Montgomery G.I Bill Form DD Form 2366, etc).
For joins processed outside of IBI, is the join audit process completed IAW MCTFSPRIUM, 12-120103?
For joins processed outside of IBI, is the PCS travel claim submitted in accordance with current regulations?

For joins processed outside of IBI or at DUINS station, is the unit ensuring all required documents are resident in the OMPF? (Contractual documents (i.e. DD Form 4, DD Form 1966), dependent documents (as applicable i.e. NAVMC 10922, Marriage Certificate), and as applicable, Meritorious Promotion Warrants (DD Form 216), Montgomery G.I Bill Form DD Form 2366, etc).
For Marines arriving to their first Permanent Duty Station (PDS), is a comprehensive review of Pay and Allowance received through the training pipeline completed within 60 days of reporting?
Is the Inbound Interview (IBI) set in a 'MOL-Submitted' status within 5 days of the report date?
Is the Travel Interview (TVI) submitted within 5 working days of the report date?
Is the Inbound Interview (IBI) set in a 'MOL-Approved' status within 15 days of the report date?
Are active duty reporting units validating pay and entitlements for activated reservist attached to their administrative reporting unit code (ARUC)?
For joins processed outside of IBI, does the organization maintain and retain supporting documents on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?
Is the Inbound Interview (IBI) set in a 'MOL-Submitted' status within 5 days of the report date?
Is the Travel Interview (TVI) submitted within 5 working days of the report date?
Is the Inbound Interview (IBI) set in a 'MOL-Approved' status within 15 days of the report date?
